item.name: Midan Chest Gear Coffer (IL 240)
item.description:
A weighty chest containing a piece of Midan attire.

Required level: 60. IL: 240. Chest gear type determined by current job or class at time of opening. Cannot be opened in instanced areas such as dungeons, PvP areas, or raids.

obj.n: Alexander - The Burden of the Son (Savage)
